item.title: GPT-5 Released with Major Improvements
item.description: OpenAI has released GPT-5 with significant performance improvements over its predecessor.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI has released GPT-5 with significant performance improvements. The new model features improved reasoning capabilities and lower latency.

item.title: New LLM Benchmark Results
item.description: Latest benchmark results for major language models show interesting trends.

item.title: Old Article from Last Week
item.description: This is an old article that should be filtered out.
